plot outline: Governor George W. Bush of Texas, picks Dick Cheney, the CEO of Halliburton Company, to be his Republican running mate in the 2000 presidential election. No stranger to politics, Cheney's impressive resume includes stints as White House Chief of Staff, House Minority Whip, and Defense Secretary. When Bush wins by a narrow margin, Cheney begins to use his newfound power to help reshape the country and the world.
title: Vice
akas: El vici del poder (Spain, Catalan title)

other companies.name: International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees (IATSE)
